message:
fix(audit): second wave audit fixes across 6 subsystems

- LoadBalancer: fix in-flight counter leak (HIGH) — LoadBalancedFuture
  now holds Arc<LoadMetric> and decrements on completion/drop
- LoadMetric::decrement: use fetch_update to prevent underflow wrapping
- Console rgb_to_basic: fix u16 overflow in luminance calc (u16→u32)
- Console from_hex: add is_ascii() guard to prevent UTF-8 boundary panic
- SignalHandler: clamp force_quit_threshold=0 to 1 (prevents spurious
  force-quit before any signal is received)
- Web extractors: make Content-Type matching case-insensitive per RFC 9110
- PostgreSQL URL parsing: add percent-decoding for user/password/host/database
- HTTP client cookie store: cap per-host cookies (64) and host count (256)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
